name: Moose Landing Country Club
about: Moose Landing Country Club is a public golf venue offering both an 18-hole, par-72 course designed by Bob Simmons and indoor augmented-reality golf simulators powered by TruGolf. The venue features an on-site tavern, Fore 1 Tavern, providing a full bar and kitchen food options for guests. It caters to various golfers, from those looking for practice time on simulators to players enjoying a round on the course, with premium membership plans available for discounts and reciprocal rates at other area courses.
why_golfers_like_it: Augmented-reality simulators allow golfing anytime, rain or shine
On-site Fore 1 Tavern provides a full bar and food options under the same roof as the simulators
The venue offers a mix of real-world golf and high-tech simulator play
Public access with optional membership plans for discounts and benefits
Friendly environment for both casual play and serious practice sessions

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen food service available at Fore 1 Tavern
Full bar service available at Fore 1 Tavern

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs to use the simulators?
faq.answer: No, the venue provides a full set of left and right-handed golf clubs for use in the simulators, including for casual players who never golf.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has an on-site tavern, Fore 1 Tavern, that provides a full bar and kitchen food options. You can order food and drinks directly from the tavern while playing.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The content does not specify a typical duration for 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly. The Fore 1 Tavern offers a family-friendly environment to share meals, and the simulators are accessible for people of all skill levels.
